description_long: This is a black ceramic cup featuring a vibrant Pac-Man arcade game motif on its exterior. The cup has a classic cylindrical shape with a smoothly curved handle attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. The Pac-Man design is detailed, showing the iconic maze, characters, and score text in bright blue, yellow, red, and white colors, making it visually striking. The interior of the cup is filled with a brown liquid, likely representing coffee or tea, and the rim is slightly glossy, indicating a glazed finish. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, seamlessly integrated into the cup's body. The overall appearance is playful and nostalgic, suitable for both home and urban café settings.
description: A black ceramic cup with a Pac-Man arcade game design, featuring a curved handle and filled with a brown liquid. The cup is glossy and visually striking with colorful retro artwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pac-Man maze design, score text, and two ghosts at the center, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the handle, with the Pac-Man design partially visible on the sides and the glossy rim and brown liquid inside.
description_view_2: Front-left view highlighting the Pac-Man artwork and handle on the left, with the maze and characters clearly visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing mostly the plain black surface of the cup, with only the edges of the Pac-Man design visible.
